{"data":[{"id":5,"name":"SankalpTaru Foundation","description":"Afforestation and reforestation non profit working PAN India. Have developer green patches on community barren lands. Also, planted fruit bearing saplings in farmers fields to provide them additional source of sustainable livelihood. Planted and survived more than 3 million trees and wish to plant millions more to make this planet greener and better for the future.","image":"uploads\/all\/w1zVRexe1dyYOfMLMxFKGglPJooPZGTNAwUc32dQ.png"},{"id":6,"name":"SEED Madagascar","description":"We implement sustainable development projects spanning four key areas - conservation, community health, education and livelihoods, in the southeast of Madagascar.  Madagascar is one of the world\u2019s biodiversity hotspots and also home to some of the world\u2019s poorest people. Our aim is to establish long-term impact, in partnership with the communities, for the benefit of people and planet.","image":"uploads\/all\/jVX1bHrsybteYqEqwb8zX2Hy1X6r9dv65uEcDpaX.png"},{"id":7,"name":"APOPO","description":"APOPO is a global non-profit that trains detection animals (nicknamed HeroRATs and HeroDOGs) to use their amazing sense of smell to save lives. Our animals, as well as brave handlers and deminers, are responsible for finding and destroying leftover landmines and other explosives in post-conflict countries like Cambodia, Angola, Zimbabwe and South Sudan. Clearing minefields not only saves lives but releasing safe land into communities for development allows people to rebuild their lives and livelihoods. This also protects threatened species affected by these remnants of war, such as African elephants. Innovative research is carried out by APOPO using tuberculosis (TB) detection rats as a cost-efficient, rapid diagnostic tool. Integrating these HeroRATs boosts patient detection rates of partner clinics by 40% in three high TB-burden countries. As global attention and funding moved to support the Covid-19 response, this has devastated TB-control efforts worldwide. It is even more critical to find, treat and stop the spread of TB as quickly as possible.","image":"uploads\/all\/kqHpPRYczYzgAGbCxtCHEyIEVLAIte0imqvYAPPl.png"}],"links":{"first":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities?page=1","last":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities?page=2","prev":null,"next":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities?page=2"},"meta":{"current_page":1,"from":1,"last_page":2,"links":[{"url":null,"label":"\u00ab Previous","active":false},{"url":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities?page=1","label":"1","active":true},{"url":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities?page=2","label":"2","active":false},{"url":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities?page=2","label":"Next \u00bb","active":false}],"path":"http:\/\/mytreety.test\/api\/v2\/charities","per_page":3,"to":3,"total":5},"success":true,"status":200}
